diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -1,6 +1,21 @@
 import torch

 import torch.nn as nn

 from transformers import CLIPModel

+

+

+class GradReverse(torch.autograd.Function):

+    @staticmethod

+    def forward(ctx, x, lambd):

+        ctx.lambd = lambd

+        return x.view_as(x)

+

+    @staticmethod

+    def backward(ctx, grad_output):

+        return -ctx.lambd * grad_output, None

+

+

+def grad_reverse(x, lambd=1.0):

+    return GradReverse.apply(x, lambd)

 

 

 class FrozenCLIPClassifier(nn.Module):

@@ -38,5 +53,33 @@
         return self.classifier(feats)

 

 

+class DGHead(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, feat_dim, num_classes, num_domains, hidden_dim=1024, dropout=0.3):

+        super().__init__()

+        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Dropout(dropout),

+            nn.Linear(feat_dim, hidden_dim),

+            nn.GELU(),

+            nn.Dropout(dropout),

+            nn.Linear(hidden_dim, num_classes),

+        )

+        dom_hidden = max(256, hidden_dim // 2)

+        self.domain_head = nn.Sequential(

+            nn.Linear(feat_dim, dom_hidden),

+            nn.GELU(),

+            nn.Dropout(dropout),

+            nn.Linear(dom_hidden, num_domains),

+        )

+

+    def forward(self, feats, grl_lambda=0.0):

+        class_logits = self.classifier(feats)

+        rev = grad_reverse(feats, grl_lambda)

+        domain_logits = self.domain_head(rev)

+        return class_logits, domain_logits

+

+    def predict(self, feats):

+        return self.classifier(feats)

+

+

 def build_model(model_name='openai/clip-vit-base-patch16', num_classes=182, hidden_dim=0, dropout=0.2, normalize=True):

     return FrozenCLIPClassifier(model_name=model_name, num_classes=num_classes, hidden_dim=hidden_dim, dropout=dropout, normalize=normalize)

+    hidden_dim = ckpt.get('hidden_dim', 1024)

     normalize = ckpt.get('normalize', True)

     num_classes = ckpt.get('num_classes', 182)

     use_flip = ckpt.get('use_flip', False)

+    head_type = ckpt.get('head_type', 'linear')

 

     processor = CLIPImageProcessor.from_pretrained(model_name)

     processor.size = {'shortest_edge': img_size}

     device = 'cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu'

-    model = build_model(model_name=model_name, num_classes=num_classes, hidden_dim=hidden_dim, dropout=dropout, normalize=normalize)

+    model = build_model(model_name=model_name, num_classes=num_classes, hidden_dim=0, dropout=dropout, normalize=normalize)

     model.clip.load_state_dict(ckpt['clip_state_dict'])

-    model.classifier.load_state_dict(ckpt['classifier_state_dict'])

     for p in model.clip.parameters():

         p.requires_grad = False

     model.to(device)

     model.eval()

+

+    if head_type == 'dghead':

+        feat_dim = model.feat_dim

+        num_domains = ckpt['num_domains']

+        head = DGHead(feat_dim=feat_dim, num_classes=num_classes, num_domains=num_domains, hidden_dim=hidden_dim, dropout=dropout).to(device)

+        head.load_state_dict(ckpt['head_state_dict'])

+        head.eval()

+    else:

+        classifier = model.classifier

+        classifier.load_state_dict(ckpt['classifier_state_dict'])

+        classifier.to(device)

+        classifier.eval()

+        head = None

 

     flips = [False, True] if use_flip else [False]

     all_logits = None

@@ -75,7 +88,8 @@

-                logits = model(x)

             logits_cat = torch.cat(logits_list, dim=0)

             all_logits = logits_cat if all_logits is None else all_logits + logits_cat

-def build_feature_cache(model, data_dir, split, processor, batch_size, num_workers, device, use_flip):

+def build_feature_cache(model, data_dir, split, processor, batch_size, num_workers, device, use_flip, with_location=False):

         logger.log({
